# Pull Request

Thanks for contributing to **sGBA** ❤️
Please fill out the sections below to help us review your change efficiently.

---

## Summary

<!--
Briefly explain what this PR does and why it exists.
Focus on the problem being solved, not just the implementation.
-->

## Motivation & Context

<!--
Why is this change needed?
Link to issues or discussions.
-->

Fixes: <!-- #issue-number (if applicable) -->

## Implementation Details

<!--
Explain any non-obvious decisions.
Call out tricky parts, tradeoffs, or emulation-specific considerations.
-->

## Test Results (if applicable)

<!--
If your change affects emulation accuracy, note results from the mGBA test suite or other test ROMs.
Screenshots or recordings of before/after are very helpful for rendering changes.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style and conventions
- [ ] No unnecessary formatting or unrelated changes
- [ ] Unit tests added where applicable and all passing
- [ ] I'm okay with this PR being rejected or requested to change 🙂
